title: Global trade disrupted, Adobe/Figma canceled, realtors sued, Trump blocked
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros: Jason comes in hot, All-In's new Chairman Dictator, Holiday party recap, and more

(7:54) Understanding the trade disruption in the Red Sea: Houthis, global impact on trade, the dicey geopolitical situation, and how this compares to COVID freight prices with Flexport's Ryan Petersen

(35:55) Major M&A deals called off, downstream impacts of a hawkish regulatory environment

(54:15) The new era of startup building: less capital raised, less overhead costs, more profitable, smaller exits with higher founder/employee ownership percentages

(1:17:01) Bombshell class action lawsuits against the NAR and other real estate brokerages, how this could change residential real estate in the US

(1:31:58) Colorado bans Trump from primary ballots

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses global trade disruptions, the canceled Adobe-Figma merger, class action lawsuits against real estate brokerages, and Trump being blocked from primary ballots in Colorado. The episode features guest Ryan Petersen, CEO of Flexport, and covers various topics including geopolitics, startup building, and regulatory environments. The hosts also share their insights on the current state of the economy and the potential implications of these events.

takeaways.text: Global trade is being disrupted by the Houthi attacks in the Red Sea
The Adobe-Figma merger was canceled due to regulatory issues
Startups are now building with less capital and overhead costs
Class action lawsuits are being filed against real estate brokerages for inflating commissions
Trump has been blocked from primary ballots in Colorado
The regulatory environment is becoming increasingly hawkish
The new era of startup building prioritizes profitability and founder/employee ownership
The real estate industry may be impacted by changes in commission structures

quotes.text: We're in a new era of startup building
quotes.speaker: Jason Calacanis

quotes.text: The regulatory environment is a major concern
quotes.speaker: Chamath Palihapitiya

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern about the current state of global trade and the regulatory environment, but also see opportunities for startups to thrive in this new era.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of global trade disruption begins
New era of startup building is introduced
Class action lawsuits against real estate brokerages are discussed
Trump being blocked from primary ballots in Colorado is discussed
